name: voicescape-mobile
description: VoiceScope Android app — Capacitor wrapper around the shared client/ React app

scripts.sync: npm run build:client && cap sync android
scripts.run:android: npm run sync && cap run android
scripts.build:apk:debug: npm run sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.build:apk:release: npm run sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
